Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Million Hearts® CVD Risk Reduction Model Medicare Data Files Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.1 12 

BILLING_TIN 

LABEL: Practice's Billing TIN 

DESCRIPTION: Practice's billing federal Taxpayer Identification Number (TIN). 

SHORT NAME: BILLING_TIN 

LONG NAME: BILLING_TIN 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 9 

FILE(S): Practice 

SOURCE: Million Hearts Data Registry 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: Identifies the practice to whom payment was made for the Million
